entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Important components of sustainable agricultural production, food, nutrition and income systems in developing countries

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: A system of agricultural production that is sustainable

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where legumes are critical for food and income systems

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Biological challenges to legume production, including diseases and pests

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: A type of biotic stress affecting legume crops

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: A type of biotic stress affecting legume crops

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-biological challenges to legume production, including heat, frost, drought and salinity

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress affecting legume crops

entities.name: FROST
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress affecting legume crops

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress affecting legume crops

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress affecting legume crops

entities.name: EDAPHIC FACTORS
entities.description: Soil-related factors, specifically nutrient deficits, that challenge legume production

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT DEFICITS
entities.description: Specific edaphic factors that limit legume crop production

entities.name: POLICY ISSUES
entities.description: Challenges where legumes receive less emphasis compared to priority starchy staples

entities.name: STARCHY STAPLES
entities.description: Priority crops that often receive more policy emphasis than legumes

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes targeted by significant research and development work

entities.name: CGIAR RESEARCH PROGRAM ON GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: A collaborative program that developed genomic resources and tools for grain legumes

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Resources such as genome sequences, markers, and maps used in genetic and breeding applications

entities.description: A specific genomic tool used for breeding applications

entities.name: RESEQUENCING DATA
entities.description: A specific genomic tool used for breeding applications

entities.name: LARGE-SCALE GENOMEWIDE MARKERS
entities.description: Genomic markers used for genetic and breeding applications

entities.name: DENSE GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: Genomic tools used for genetic and breeding applications

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with specific traits used in breeding

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKERS
entities.description: Markers used to identify specific traits or varieties

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING APPROACHES
entities.description: Integration of genomics to enhance genetic gains and reduce cultivar development time

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A method to reduce the time required in cultivar development
